config.Enable_BobberBarFishIcon.name: Enable: Bobber Bar Fish Icon
config.Enable_BobberBarFishIcon.desc: Replace the fish icon in the minigame with the real fish icon.
config.UncaughtFishSilhouette.name: Show Silhouette for Uncaught Fish
config.UncaughtFishSilhouette.desc: Until you catch the fish, the fish will be shown as silhouette.
config.Enable_GuarenteedSpecificBait.des: Make the targeted bait always get the targeted fish if the season and conditions match, while ignoring weather, time, and catch limits.
